info.title: SayabeliPay API
info.description: SayabeliPay payment gateway API. Supports FPX bank listing, payment initiation, transaction queries, refunds, and secure request signing via hash generation.

get.description: Retrieve FPX bank listing with their display name and online/offline status.

metadata.title: FPX Bank List
metadata.description: Retrieve available FPX banks with their status (online/offline).
metadata.og:title: List of FPX Banks

basicAuth.description: Use your client_id as username and client_secret as password.

hashSignature.name: hash
hashSignature.description: SHA-256 hash required for Payment API. Formula: clientSecret + customer_name + customer_email + customer_phone + order_no + amount + order_detail + (payment_code or channel).
